오바댜 1:1.content: The vision of Obadiah. This is what the Lord Yahweh says about Edom. We have heard news from Yahweh, and an ambassador is sent among the nations, saying, “Arise, and let’s rise up against her in battle.

오바댜 1:2.content: Behold, I have made you small among the nations. You are greatly despised.

오바댜 1:3.content: The pride of your heart has deceived you, you who dwell in the clefts of the rock, whose habitation is high, who says in his heart, ‘Who will bring me down to the ground?’

오바댜 1:4.content: Though you mount on high as the eagle, and though your nest is set among the stars, I will bring you down from there,” says Yahweh.

오바댜 1:5.content: “If thieves came to you, if robbers by night—oh, what disaster awaits you—wouldn’t they only steal until they had enough? If grape pickers came to you, wouldn’t they leave some gleaning grapes?

오바댜 1:6.content: How Esau will be ransacked! How his hidden treasures are sought out!

오바댜 1:7.content: All the men of your alliance have brought you on your way, even to the border. The men who were at peace with you have deceived you, and prevailed against you. Friends who eat your bread lay a snare under you. There is no understanding in him.”

오바댜 1:8.content: “Won’t I in that day”, says Yahweh, “destroy the wise men out of Edom, and understanding out of the mountain of Esau?

오바댜 1:9.content: Your mighty men, Teman, will be dismayed, to the end that everyone may be cut off from the mountain of Esau by slaughter.

오바댜 1:10.content: For the violence done to your brother Jacob, shame will cover you, and you will be cut off forever.

오바댜 1:11.content: In the day that you stood on the other side, in the day that strangers carried away his substance, and foreigners entered into his gates, and cast lots for Jerusalem, even you were like one of them.

오바댜 1:12.content: But don’t look down on your brother in the day of his disaster, and don’t rejoice over the children of Judah in the day of their destruction. Don’t speak proudly in the day of distress.

오바댜 1:13.content: Don’t enter into the gate of my people in the day of their calamity. Don’t look down on their affliction in the day of their calamity, neither seize their wealth on the day of their calamity.

오바댜 1:14.content: Don’t stand in the crossroads to cut off those of his who escape. Don’t deliver up those of his who remain in the day of distress.

오바댜 1:15.content: For the day of Yahweh is near all the nations! As you have done, it will be done to you. Your deeds will return upon your own head.

오바댜 1:16.content: For as you have drunk on my holy mountain, so will all the nations drink continually. Yes, they will drink, swallow down, and will be as though they had not been.

오바댜 1:17.content: But in Mount Zion, there will be those who escape, and it will be holy. The house of Jacob will possess their possessions.

오바댜 1:18.content: The house of Jacob will be a fire, the house of Joseph a flame, and the house of Esau for stubble. They will burn among them, and devour them. There will not be any remaining to the house of Esau.” Indeed, Yahweh has spoken.

오바댜 1:19.content: Those of the South will possess the mountain of Esau, and those of the lowland, the Philistines. They will possess the field of Ephraim, and the field of Samaria. Benjamin will possess Gilead.

오바댜 1:20.content: The captives of this army of the children of Israel, who are among the Canaanites, will possess even to Zarephath; and the captives of Jerusalem, who are in Sepharad, will possess the cities of the Negev.

오바댜 1:21.content: Saviors will go up on Mount Zion to judge the mountains of Esau, and the kingdom will be Yahweh’s.
